summary: Pipeline-based momentum calculation verified. All features working correctly. Backend: 9/9 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements display correctly. Marcus (Campus Visit, 73 momentum) correctly shows NO momentum_drop despite 24 days inactive. Lucas (Offer, 96 momentum) shows high momentum. Sarah (Initial Contact, 20 momentum) shows early stage momentum. Penn State (Prospect) correctly shows overdue_followups=0 and 'EARLY STAGE' badge.
critical_code_review_comments: STAGE_WEIGHTS correctly defined: Prospect=10, Initial Contact=20, Campus Visit=70, Offer=90, Committed=100
Breadth bonus correctly computed: +3 per school at 20+ stage, max 10
detect_momentum_drop() correctly checks pipeline_momentum >= 50 returns None (no momentum_drop)
get_current_issue() in pod_issues.py correctly auto-resolves momentum_drop when pipeline_momentum >= 50
_build_athlete_roster_item() correctly returns pipeline_momentum as momentum_score and pipeline_best_stage
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pipeline-based momentum is WORKING. Key verification points: 1) Marcus Johnson (athlete_3) at Campus Visit has momentum=73 and is in 'On Track' section, NOT showing momentum_drop despite 24 days inactive. 2) Lucas Rodriguez (athlete_5) at Offer has momentum=96. 3) Sarah Martinez (athlete_4) at Initial Contact has momentum=20. 4) Penn State (Prospect) correctly shows overdue_followups=0 and 'EARLY STAGE' badge. 5) Frontend RosterSection.js OnTrackRow displays 'Best: {stage} · {momentum}/100' format. 6) decision_engine.py only triggers momentum_drop when pipeline_momentum < 30 AND days >= 14.
